---
name: Bug report
about: A reproducible bug in the pulse-player components or the demo
title: 'bug: '
labels: bug
---

## What happened

<!-- A clear, factual statement. What did you do, what did you expect, what did the component actually do? -->

## Reproduction

<!-- Either: a short code snippet that fails, or a CodeSandbox / StackBlitz link, or step-by-step instructions running against this repo's own demo. -->

## Environment

- pulse-player version: <!-- check the `version` field in package.json -->
- Vue version:
- Pinia version:
- Browser + OS: <!-- e.g. Chrome 124 on macOS 14, Firefox 125 on Windows 11 -->
- Mobile? Touch screen? Stylus?

## What you've tried

<!-- Optional. Things that didn't help / that you ruled out. Helps us avoid re-treading the same ground. -->

## Screenshots / screen recording

<!-- Optional but very helpful for visual regressions and animation issues. -->
